name: N.yr.eve Feast - 2. Stuffed Chicken Breasts W
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine Swiss and Ricotta cheeses, thyme, and cracked black pepper.
2. Place a chicken breast on a flat surface. Cut a 2-1/2 inch horizontal slit into the side of the chicken breast to form a pocket.
3. Repeat with the remaining breasts. Stuff each pocket with 2 tablespoons of the cheese mixture.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Bring water to boil for pasta.
6. In a medium skillet over medium-high heat, melt butter. If using dried pasta, add it to boiling water and cook until tender.
7. If using fresh pasta, add it to boiling water and cook until tender.
8. Turn the chicken breasts in the skillet; reduce heat to medium and cook for 4-5 minutes until cooked through.
9. Drain the fettuccine well and place on a large serving platter.
10. Place the chicken breasts on top of the pasta.
11. Remove the skillet from heat, add brandy, chicken broth, tomato paste, and chives.
12. Place the skillet back over high heat; boil for 2 minutes.
13. Spoon the sauce over the fettuccine.
